source_name: Singapore primary sources — Straits Times / MDDI press releases (UPA bans 2017-2021)
_note: Six post-2015 UPA bans documented in primary Singapore sources (Straits Times + Ministry of Digital Development and Information press releases). Per-link locator carries the specific article URL for each ban. Compiled via Perplexity research 2026-05-29.

entries.title: Book Of Tawheed 1
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Banned in Singapore in 2017 under the Undesirable Publications Act 1967 for extremist religious content (one of 4 books banned simultaneously).

entries.title: Book Of Tawheed
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Banned in Singapore in 2017 under the Undesirable Publications Act 1967 for extremist religious content (one of 4 books banned simultaneously).

entries.title: Encyclopaedia For Fiqh In Islam In Al-Quran And As-Sunnah
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Banned in Singapore in 2017 under the Undesirable Publications Act 1967 for extremist religious content (one of 4 books banned simultaneously).

entries.title: Islamic Guidance For A Muslim
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Banned in Singapore in 2017 under the Undesirable Publications Act 1967 for extremist religious content (one of 4 books banned simultaneously).

entries.title: Understanding the Evil of Innovation
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Found 'objectionable' by Singapore's Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA) in 2020 for denigrating references to Judaism and Christianity.

entries.title: Menyingkap Rahsia Tentera Elit Briged Izzuddin Al-Qassam: Generasi Muda Perindu Syahid
entries.author: Anonymous
entries.description: Banned in Singapore in 2021 under the Undesirable Publications Act 1967 for extremist content and incitement to violent jihad. Concerns the Izz ad-Din al-Qassam Brigades (military wing of Hamas).
